title: 断航故土

format.visual_style: grounded cinematic eastern epic fantasy with restrained magic

global_principles: Preserve continuity over isolated image beauty.
Use grounded materials, worn surfaces, controlled lighting, and visible story props.
Keep magic effects short, residual, and tied to old infrastructure or bloodline reaction.
Show large events through close-ups, sound cues, shadows, partial silhouettes, smoke, snow, and aftermath.
global_negative_rules: no full heroic armor for Shen Weisang in season 01
no modern weapons or modern tactical gear
no clean fantasy palace beauty for ruined Zhaoming relics
no full monster-only insect villains for Sumin officials
no large-scale battlefield crowd unless specifically required by later director-room outputs

gold_red.usage: Shen Weisang spirit-wing residual marks, old relay light routes, firelight reflections

moon_white.usage: Yan Nanzhi jade, treaty platform, broken star charts

qingming_white.usage: Bai Yi, Qingming Court, registers, insect wax, cleansing authority

faction_systems.name: 昭明旧帝国遗产
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Relics must look damaged, covered, partial, or rediscovered; never pristine imperial glory in season 01.

faction_systems.name: 肃明国与清明院
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Always clean, cold, and bureaucratic; insect traits are controlled and partial.

faction_systems.name: 边墙与灰墙军
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Border people must look exhausted, repaired, and practical, not like clean imperial soldiers.

faction_systems.name: 墙下混裔
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Mixed heritage traits should be subtle and lived-in, not decorative spectacle.

faction_systems.name: 北境寻灾源派
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Only partial presence in season 01; avoid turning episode 09 into a full northern tribe showcase.

state_continuity.shen_weisang_after_ep02: charred hem must remain visible or implied in every outfit state
state_continuity.yan_nanzhi_all_season: red hair cord and moon-white jade must remain visible unless temporarily hidden for disguise
state_continuity.bai_yi_all_scenes: white robe, wing-membrane shoulder layer, insect-wax needle or Qingming register anchor
state_continuity.shen_zhaomian_after_capture: Qingming white clothing plus a remaining childhood anchor such as burned hair cord or herb pouch
state_continuity.magic_effects: spirit-wing residual marks are short gold-red lines at eye corner, shoulder blade, wrist, or old relay ground route
